metadata.title: Why One Quantum Packet Can Slosh Without Spreading
metadata.note: Clean Liam rebuild. Uses phase-space rotation and ground-state width; avoids the false claim that every noncoherent oscillator state distorts.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.label: This is Liam, in for Bear. A free quantum packet spreads as it travels. But put a special Gaussian i

beats.prompt: Release a free Gaussian packet and different momentum components accumulate phase at different rates. The probability profile widens and its peak falls.
beats.label: Release a free Gaussian packet and different momentum components accumulate phase at different rates

beats.prompt: Now place a Gaussian with exactly the oscillator ground-state width inside a parabolic potential.
beats.label: Now place a Gaussian with exactly the oscillator ground-state width inside a parabolic potential.

beats.prompt: Its center obeys the classical equation: x center double dot plus omega squared x center equals zero. So the center follows a cosine at frequency omega.
beats.label: Its center obeys the classical equation: x center double dot plus omega squared x center equals zero

beats.prompt: But center motion and packet width are different questions. The coherent state's position spread stays sigma x equals the square root of h bar over two m omega.
beats.label: But center motion and packet width are different questions. The coherent state's position spread sta

beats.prompt: In phase space, harmonic evolution is a rigid rotation. The coherent state's uncertainty patch is circular in properly scaled coordinates, so rotation cannot ch
beats.label: In phase space, harmonic evolution is a rigid rotation. The coherent state's uncertainty patch is ci

beats.prompt: The center circles through position and momentum while the uncertainty patch rides along unchanged. Back in position space, the Gaussian simply slides left and
beats.label: The center circles through position and momentum while the uncertainty patch rides along unchanged.

beats.prompt: It remains minimum uncertainty: sigma x times sigma p equals h bar over two at every time.
beats.label: It remains minimum uncertainty: sigma x times sigma p equals h bar over two at every time.

beats.prompt: A squeezed Gaussian is different. Its uncertainty patch is elliptical, so phase-space rotation makes the position width breathe even in the same harmonic well.
beats.label: A squeezed Gaussian is different. Its uncertainty patch is elliptical, so phase-space rotation makes

beats.prompt: And an anharmonic well spoils the rigid rotation. Different parts shear at different rates, so even a once-coherent packet can deform.
beats.label: And an anharmonic well spoils the rigid rotation. Different parts shear at different rates, so even

beats.label: For one ideal optical mode, the same mathematics defines a coherent state of light. Real lasers can

beats.prompt: The packet does not defeat dispersion by magic. Exact harmonic dynamics rotates a ground-width Gaussian without squeezing or shearing it.
beats.label: The packet does not defeat dispersion by magic. Exact harmonic dynamics rotates a ground-width Gauss

The center moves like a classical oscillator. The quantum width stays locked.
